text:
NAME: 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_1 PRCDR_CD_SYS_4 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_2 PRCDR_CD_SYS_5 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_3 PRCDR_CD_SYS_6 

LONG NAME: 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_1 PRCDR_CD_SYS_4 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_2 PRCDR_CD_SYS_5 
PRCDR_CD_SYS_3 PRCDR_CD_SYS_6 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: 01 = CPT 4 
02 = ICD-9 CM 
06 = HCPCS (Both national and regional HCPCS) 
07 = ICD-10-CM/PCS (implemented on 10/1/2015) 
10–87 = Other systems 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown
